data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Upgrade offers at entry', but the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where an upgrade offer is presented when entry is denied, it lacks the necessary evidence to demonstrate that this feature is implemented effectively. The absence of specific evidence pointers related to the upgrade offer functionality leads to the conclusion that there is a gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the upgrade offers at entry functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
